project_type: Flutter mobile app (Dream11 clone) - Fantasy Cricket Platform
build_system: Flutter SDK 3.27.1 with pub for dependencies
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to check for compilation errors. No unit tests exist.
environment_constraints: Flutter 3.27.1 available. No device/emulator for runtime testing. Verification limited to static analysis.
contribution_requirements: Commit all changes on current branch pr/ui-data-binding-fix. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Clean Architecture with features/{name}/data|domain|presentation layers. Riverpod for state management (StateNotifier + StateNotifierProvider). GoRouter for navigation. Supabase for backend with real-time subscriptions. Models have fromJson/toJson/copyWith. Providers are family providers keyed by matchId.
directory_structure: lib/core/ (router, theme, network, utils), lib/features/ (auth, home, matches, contests, fantasy, wallet, groups, profile, notifications, admin), lib/shared/widgets/
